faqs.answer: Each passenger is allowed 15kg luggage.
faqs.faq: What is the luggage policy?

faqs.answer: Yes, cancellation allowed before departure.
faqs.faq: Can I cancel my ticket?
What is the luggage policy?
faqs.answer: Each passenger is allowed 15kg of checked luggage and 1 small cabin bag.

faqs.faq: Can I cancel my ticket?
faqs.answer: Yes, cancellations are allowed up to 6 hours before departure. Cancellation charges may apply.

faqs.faq: Are there restroom breaks during the journey?
faqs.answer: Yes, the bus will stop for a 15-20 minute break at a designated rest stop.

faqs.faq: Is there a charging point on the bus?
faqs.answer: Charging points are available on AC and Volvo buses. Non-AC buses may not have them.

faqs.faq: What safety measures are in place?
faqs.answer: All buses have GPS tracking, CCTV cameras, and verified drivers with valid licenses.

faqs.faq: Can I carry food on the bus?
faqs.answer: Light snacks are allowed. Avoid strong-smelling food out of courtesy to other passengers.

faqs.faq: How do I find my boarding point?
faqs.answer: Boarding point details with address and landmark are shared via SMS and email after booking.

faqs.faq: What is the refund policy?
faqs.answer: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days to the original payment method after cancellation.
